fields.notManagedByWorkbench: This AIM was not deployed through Workbench. To use it with API keys and external access, please deploy it from the Workbench UI instead.

inferenceRequests.title: Inference requests
inferenceRequests.description: Number of inference requests processed by the workload over time.

timeToFirstToken.title: Time to first token
timeToFirstToken.description: Time taken from receiving an inference request to generating the first token.

interTokenLatency.title: Inter-token latency
interTokenLatency.description: Average time between generating consecutive tokens during inference.

endToEndLatency.title: End-to-end latency
endToEndLatency.description: Total time taken from receiving an inference request to completing the response.

maxRequests.title: Max requests
maxRequests.description: Maximum number of concurrent requests handled by the workload during the selected time range.

minRequests.title: Min requests
minRequests.description: Minimum number of concurrent requests observed during the selected time range. Useful as a baseline for autoscaling.

avgRequests.title: Avg requests
avgRequests.description: Average number of concurrent requests during the selected time range. Represents typical load for autoscaling decisions.

totalRequests.title: Total requests
totalRequests.description: Total number of completed inference requests during the selected time range.

totalTokens.title: Total tokens
totalTokens.description: Total number of tokens generated by the workload over time.

kvCacheUsage.title: KV Cache usage
kvCacheUsage.description: Amount of key-value cache used by the workload during inference.

gpuConsumption.title: GPU consumption
gpuConsumption.description: Number of GPUs in use by this workload.

vram.title: VRAM
vram.description: GPU memory (VRAM) in use by this workload.

refresh.error: Failed to fetch workloads. {{error, default='Please try again later'}}.

logs.error: Failed to fetch logs. {{error, default='Please try again later'}}.

errors.noLaunchUrl: Could not launch workload, workload missing a launch URL.
errors.noRunningWorkload: Workload is not running. Can't open workspace.

confirmation.title: Confirm workload deletion
confirmation.description: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}} workload? This action is irreversible.

notification.error: Failed to delete workload. Please try again.

workloadNotFound.title: The workload is not found
workloadNotFound.description: Check if the workload should be presented in the "{{project}}" project and try again
